messages.author: alice_chen
messages.text: Checking. Looks like Users receiving 3–5 identical push notifications per order event. Investigating.

messages.author: jake_wilson
messages.text: I see it too. Could be related to recent deploy.

messages.author: alice_chen
messages.text: Found the issue: Kafka consumer group rebalance during deploy caused messages to be re-processed .... Deploying fix.

messages.author: alice_chen
messages.text: Confirmed resolved. Writing up incident report.
